theme: honest payments for a land-plot auction, cheaply
title: Honest Frontage: Minimum-Gate VCG Payments for a Row of Land Plots
strategies: recompute every leave-one-out economy from scratch with redundant forward+backward double-checking (trivial/baseline)
recompute every leave-one-out economy from scratch using the efficient O(n) welfare recurrence, but never share work across economies (greedy, ~4n^2 gates)
one shared forward prefix DP + one shared backward suffix DP; every leave-one-out welfare and VCG payment is an O(1) stitch of the two (strong, ~9n gates)
further common-subexpression sharing across the n payment tails / fused comparison-multiply gates (open ceiling, uncovered)
